That’s according to UOL, who say talks have been held with his former club about a return, but it is unlikely to happen. arts.ttl: Man Utd and Napoli swap deal for Osimhen is OFF
arts.sum: That is according to Kiss Kiss Napoli journalist Paolo Del Genio, who reports that this potential exchange is dead in the water and will not happen either in January or at the end of the season. Manchester United were discussing a potential swap deal with Napoli that would have seen Joshua Zirkzee and Victor Osimhen change clubs, but the deal is now off.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta can finally complete two-year Arsenal transfer mission - but there's a catch - football.london
arts.sum: "I know the players who entered the first team when they were 17 or 18 and played in an Ajax team that dominated the league and went far in Europe," he told The Athletic. Though it is clear Arsenal will likely remain big fans of Hato, transfer priorities appear elsewhere, and thus formally entering the race for his signature is hard to imagine, despite the expectation he departs Johan Cruyff Arena in 2025.
